EmailTemplate.name: Premium Support - Offer
EmailTemplate.subject: Premium Support Options
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting in touch with Kingsbridge.
For those who are having payment issues with their policy, we have negotiated premium support options with our underwriters that you may wish to consider so you can keep your cover in place.
Payment Support Options
(Delete as required – paid in full) Our underwriters have agreed to credit your credit card/debit card account with a payment of £0.00, which you can expect to receive in 3 to 5 working days. This is the equivalent of 60 days’ worth of your base premium (excluding any add-ons).
(Delete as required - paid by DD) Our underwriters have agreed to credit your bank account with 2 monthly instalment amounts. Please note that your payment schedule with Close Brothers will continue as planned, this credit is intended to help cover instalments for the next two months.
(Delete as required – last 2 payments) Our underwriters have agreed to cover the last two payments of your policy. This means that you would not owe any premiums going forward, but your policy would not expire until (DD MM YY).
Furthermore, Close Brothers have a one-month payment holiday scheme in place. If you wish to apply for a one month payment holiday, you will need to contact Close Brothers on 0333 321 8566 (Option 1) or via this link: https://d2cjxhvv9uqb7.cloudfront.net/. Close Brothers will advise what the next steps are.
If you wish to proceed with our premium support option, please reply to this email or call us on 01242 808 740 as soon as possible so that we can get this in place for you.
If we or Close Brothers do not hear from you, your payment schedule will continue as planned.
Whether you’re currently insured with Kingsbridge or not, our customer service team is always here to help. Please don’t hesitate to reply to this email if you need any further information on any of the above.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
